title: CrewAI AMP Kickoff
description: Request payload for POST /kickoff on a CrewAI AMP per-crew endpoint.

inputs.description: Key-value pairs of crew inputs. Schema is crew-specific; discover keys via GET /inputs.

meta.description: Free-form metadata echoed into webhook event payloads.

taskWebhookUrl.description: URL invoked after each task completes.

stepWebhookUrl.description: URL invoked after each agent thought or action.

crewWebhookUrl.description: URL invoked when the crew execution completes.
